text:
Night Shift Dwarves (７人の働く小人) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. These seven dwarves will do all your work whilst the user sleeps.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Night Shift Dwarves (７人の働く小人): Night Shift Dwarves are able to fulfill any work you can do during the night whilst you sleep. They cannot do anything that the user is not able to do. This card is useful for people who have a lot of work to do but still need their sleep. These dwarves can do any task that is required, providing that it is something you yourself would do.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.026 - ７人の働く小人 
主人が寝ている間だけ、代わりに働いてくれる小人。ただし主人の能力を超えるほどの要求には応じない。
|-
![Eng]
|No.026 - Night Shift Dwarves 
Only while the master is sleeping, the dwarves work instead. However, it does not respond to abilities more than the master.
|}
